title: AVANTI ELDERCARE RESOURCES INC - 211info
text: AVANTI ELDERCARE RESOURCES INC AVANTI ELDERCARE RESOURCES INC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides consultations and assessments for care and housing needs, evaluates financial and insurance resources, household and care management, monitoring/oversight, money management, and guardian and conservator services. Facilitates communication with health care providers, provides patient accompaniment to medical appointments, and home visits available for assessments and bill paying. "Just in Case" plan and estate-planning services also available. 911 Country Club Road Suite 250 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older with cognitive impairments, mental health challenges, brain injury, persons with complex health conditions, those who have been subject to financial or emotional abuse of an adult or elder, and persons who need help managing financial or health-care matters. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm or by appointment On call 24 hours per day / 7 days per week for urgent needs of established clients Email (541) 344-7712 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 344-7712 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. $105 per hour for care management, $125 per hour for professional fiduciary, $45-85 for various support services. Can coordinate other direct care providers. DOCUMENTS: None required at initial inquiry LANGUAGES: English, Italian, Spanish, Sign Language AREA SERVED: Benton, Coos, Deschutes, Douglas, Lane, Linn, Polk, Marion, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9:30 AM- 3:30 PM Monday-Friday 3:30 PM- 5PM by appointment only TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Staff will travel to meet with the client in their home. Initial evaluation fees cover travel in the Eugene/Springfield area. For hourly rate services, travel time is charged. Mileage is charged at the federal rate. Services: Case/Care Management * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Case/Care Management * Older Adults Conservatorship Assistance Elder Abuse Prevention Guardians ad Litem Personal Finances Administration Private Guardianship/Conservatorship Programs Representative Payee Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AVANTI ELDERCARE RESOURCES INC
